sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_data (index UInt64, h3_string String);
INSERT INTO h3_data (index, h3_string) VALUES (617420388352917503, h3ToString(617420388352917503));
UPDATE h3_data SET h3_string = h3ToString(617420388352917504) WHERE index = 617420388352917503;
SELECT index, h3ToString(index) AS h3_string FROM h3_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_data WHERE h3_string LIKE '89%';
